name: Moonpetal
personality: Moonpetal wears her crown with the regal poise of an axolotl who has simply decided to reign, her @ eyes serene through build failures and merge conflicts alike — she'll wait it out with royal composure, though asking her *why* it broke may be above her pay grade.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
